council_waiver_reason: S7 precedent — bounded design space (closing S7 PRIME-AUDIT delta + sister defect) + user-discretion grant. PRIME-AUDIT runs after each priority before commit.

priorities.title: Whip wave drift (tick-driven sin phase)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT pass: (1) read drawWhip diff — driftPhase = tick * 0.022 added, applied inside Math.sin term, no other behavior change; (2) typecheck clean (tsc -b --noEmit, no output); (3) 143/143 vitest tests pass — including new 'S8 P1 — fx.whip wave drift — output differs at tick=0 vs tick=120' regression test confirming the change actually animates; (4) edge cases: zero-length bond still falls through to default-line via existing guard (len<1), large tick value bounded by Math.sin domain; (5) materially better than no-fix: whip now meaningfully animates where it was static.

priorities.title: Lattice cross-hatch contrast (scale width with bond width)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT pass: (1) read drawLattice diff — crossWidth/crossAlpha locals introduced with Math.max floor 1.2 and 0.55 ratio to p.width, alpha bumped 0.5→0.65; (2) typecheck clean; (3) 37/37 tests pass — including new 'S8 P2 — fx.lattice emits 3 strokes' regression guard (1 outline + 2 cross-hatch); (4) edge cases: at HIGH (p.width=3) cross=1.65 vs outline=2.4 — meaningful contrast bump from prior 1.0; at LOW (p.width=1.5) floor=1.2 vs outline=1.2 — same width but alpha differentiation (0.5525 vs 0.85) keeps it distinguishable, plus geometry differs; SQ→SQ combo is HIGH-locked per LOCKED_DECISIONS §6 so LOW case is purely defensive; (5) materially better: the fade-at-small-bond issue from S7 PRIME-AUDIT delta is closed.

priorities.title: Warped 3-fold ring rotation + breathing (sister to whip)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT pass: (1) read drawWarped diff — rotPhase (tick * 0.008, ~13s/turn) added inside sin(a*3 + rotPhase) lobe term; breatheAmp (0.3 + sin(tick * 0.025) * 0.08) replaces the flat 0.3 multiplier; (2) typecheck clean; (3) 38/38 tests pass — including new fx.warped tick-diff regression; (4) backward-compat: at tick=0, rotPhase=0 and breatheAmp=0.3 — matches the original flat-0.3 behavior exactly (no visual jolt on first render); (5) edge cases: zero-length bond fallthrough preserved at existing guard; large tick safe under Math.sin; (6) materially better: warped now actually warps — sister defect to whip closed, both LOW-tier combos with motion-implying names are now animated.

priorities.title: Filament starburst shimmer (alpha modulation) + mock extension
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT pass: (1) read drawFilament diff — rayAlpha = p.alpha * (0.55 + sin(tick*0.04)*0.15) computed once before loop, applied to all 6 ray strokes; main bond stroke unchanged; (2) GraphicsMock.stroke() extended to capture [width, color, alpha] — backward-compatibility verified by full suite (146/146 pass, including cable static-equality which would fail if extension broke tick-independent serialization); (3) typecheck clean; (4) filament-diff test passes — at tick=0 rayAlpha=0.4675, at tick=40 rayAlpha≈0.595 (near shimmer peak, sin(1.6)≈0.9996); (5) edge cases: zero-length bond fallthrough preserved; large tick safe; (6) materially better: filament rays now pulse — completes the LOW+HIGH-tier animated set (whip, warped, filament), structural MID combos stay static.

priorities.title: Static-equality test consolidation for 6 static silhouettes
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT pass: (1) read each of the 6 static silhouette draw functions (drawCable, drawBracket, drawDiamond, drawStar, drawLattice, drawCapsule) and grepped for p.tick — confirmed zero references in all 6; (2) typecheck clean; (3) 151/151 tests pass — including all 6 new it.each entries; (4) the 12 magic silhouettes now formally split 6 animated (wheel, vortex, orbital, whip, warped, filament — all have tick-diff regression tests) + 6 static (with static-equality regression tests); (5) materially better: the opposite regression class (sloppy refactor wires tick into a structural silhouette) is now caught at test time.

priorities.title: Closeout — BACKLOG + reflexion + handoff + boot snapshot + archive
